task.title: Refine Control Room visual hierarchy and canvases
task.summary: Improve Control Room palette, CodeWiki area representation, System diagram layout, Graph zoom/scoping, and center workspace usage while preserving the working left rail/right inspector shell.

goal.outcome: The Control Room feels calmer and more usable, represents CodeWiki areas directly, and makes System/Graph canvases easier to inspect.
acceptance: Theme uses muted green as base, white/off-white as primary highlight, amber/old-gold as secondary accent, and removes blue/cyan highlight dependency.
Home or navigation workspace includes source-backed representations of Product, System, Graph, Roadmap, Builds, Validation, Diff, and Settings rather than placeholder-only areas.
System view uses a better layout with routed edges behind nodes so arrows do not cover components.
Graph view has zoom in, zoom out, fit, and reset controls, plus a less noisy default graph slice.
Center workspace uses available canvas space and avoids unnecessary nested inner containers for visual views.
Left rail and right inspector remain stable.
non_goals: No full Mermaid renderer dependency unless necessary.
No redesign of the left rail/right inspector shell.
No hosted service or cloud dependency.

checks_run: manual local server smoke via startControlRoomServer + fetch /, CSS, JS

evidence: Updated control-room.test.mjs to verify Product/Roadmap nav, muted highlight/accent palette, no cyan variable, graph zoom control, system fit control, and graph scope control.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Updated Control Room CSS palette to muted monochrome green, off-white highlight, and amber accent.
Added CodeWiki area map and area views with source anchors.
Reworked System diagram layout with lanes, orthogonal routes, edge/node inspectors, and zoom controls.
Added Graph scope defaults plus zoom in/out/fit/reset controls.
Simplified center canvas styling for System/Graph views.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Updated control-room.test.mjs to verify Product/Roadmap nav, muted highlight/accent palette, no cyan variable, graph zoom control, system fit control, and graph scope control.
code_change_evidence: Updated Control Room CSS palette to muted monochrome green, off-white highlight, and amber accent.
Added CodeWiki area map and area views with source anchors.
Reworked System diagram layout with lanes, orthogonal routes, edge/node inspectors, and zoom controls.
Added Graph scope defaults plus zoom in/out/fit/reset controls.
Simplified center canvas styling for System/Graph views.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Theme uses muted green as base, white/off-white as primary highlight, amber/old-gold as secondary accent, and removes blue/cyan highlight dependency.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: CSS variables now define --highlight #f4f1e8 and --accent #c7a35a; smoke test asserts CSS lacks 42f5ff/--cyan.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Home or navigation workspace includes source-backed representations of Product, System, Graph, Roadmap, Builds, Validation, Diff, and Settings rather than placeholder-only areas.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: AREAS model renders Home CodeWiki map plus Product/Roadmap/etc views with source anchors; smoke test asserts Product/Roadmap nav exists.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: System view uses a better layout with routed edges behind nodes so arrows do not cover components.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: System renderer now uses manual lane layout for current architecture, orthogonal edge paths, edges drawn before nodes, lane labels, and system zoom controls.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph view has zoom in, zoom out, fit, and reset controls, plus a less noisy default graph slice.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph toolbar has zoom controls, core/all scope select, node/edge filters, and search; smoke test asserts graph zoom and scope controls.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Center workspace uses available canvas space and avoids unnecessary nested inner containers for visual views.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: System and Graph views render directly into canvas containers using calc-based min-height and no terminal-panel wrapper.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Left rail and right inspector remain stable.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Shell grid, rail, and inspector layout remain; changes are contained to nav item additions and center views.
npx tsc --noEmit, node scripts/check-architecture.mjs, npm test, and manual local server smoke passed.

closure_brief.user_intent: Refine the Control Room UI after MVP review: calmer palette, no blue highlight, direct CodeWiki area representation, readable System diagram, graph zoom/scoping, better center workspace usage, and preserve left/right columns.
implemented_changes: Muted the visual theme and moved highlights to white/off-white plus amber secondary accent.
Added Product/Roadmap and CodeWiki area representations with source anchors.
Improved System architecture layout with lanes, routed edges behind nodes, and zoom/fit/reset controls.
Added graph core/all scoping plus zoom in/out/fit/reset controls.
Reduced unnecessary visual containers in center canvas views while keeping left rail and right inspector.
acceptance_evidence: control-room.test.mjs asserts palette, no cyan, Product/Roadmap nav, graph/system zoom controls, and graph scope.
Manual server smoke confirms Product nav, graph zoom JS, and no blue/cyan CSS.
non_goals_preserved: No redesign of left rail/right inspector shell.
No hosted service or cloud dependency.
remaining_risks: Future architecture nodes may need layout tuning beyond current fallback placement.

risks: System layout uses manual placements for current architecture node ids; future architecture nodes fall back to generic placement but may need tuning.
